hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'f".*SELECT|f".*INSERT|f".*UPDATE|f".*DELETE'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Detected f-string SQL. Use parameterized queries."}'; exit 0; fi; echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
